deep_dive.title: Conflict-Aware Switching for CBF-CLF-Based Multi-Goal Navigation
deep_dive.abstract: Quadratic programs (QPs) using Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) and Control Lyapunov Functions (CLFs) are widely used for safe control in reach-and-avoid navigation. However, the inherently conflicting nature of CBF and CLF constraints can lead to performance degradation, including slowdowns and deadlocks. This issue is exacerbated in multi-goal scenarios, where multiple nominal control objectives must be satisfied under shared safety constraints. Existing approaches for preemptive safety are often computationally expensive or overly conservative, while methods that relax or switch between nominal objectives are not well-suited for sequential goal-to-goal navigation. To address these limitations, we propose a conflict-aware switching strategy that detects high-conflict conditions and switches between available nominal control objectives to reduce constraint conflict. We apply this approach to multi-agent, multi-goal reach-and-avoid scenarios under CBF-CLF-QP control. Compared to a baseline sequential goal traversal strategy, our method reduces both completion time and timeout rates, demonstrating improved performance in satisfying all nominal control objectives while respecting safety constraints.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: uses Control Lyapunov Functions for safe multi-goal navigation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用控制李雅普诺夫函数进行安全多目标导航
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用控制李雅普诺夫函数进行安全多目标导航
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用控制李雅普诺夫函数进行安全多目标导航
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a conflict-aware switching strategy for CBF-CLF-based multi-goal navigation, addressing performance degradation from conflicting constraints and demonstrating improved efficiency.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对基于控制屏障函数和控制李雅普诺夫函数的多目标导航问题，分析了屏障约束与李雅普诺夫约束之间的固有冲突导致的性能下降，提出了一种冲突感知切换策略。该方法通过检测高冲突区域并智能切换控制目标，有效避免了死锁和减速现象。实验结果表明，所提策略在保证安全的前提下显著提升了导航效率，为解决多目标安全控制中的约束冲突问题提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文针对基于控制屏障函数和控制李雅普诺夫函数的多目标导航问题，分析了屏障约束与李雅普诺夫约束之间的固有冲突导致的性能下降，提出了一种冲突感知切换策略。该方法通过检测高冲突区域并智能切换控制目标，有效避免了死锁和减速现象。实验结果表明，所提策略在保证安全的前提下显著提升了导航效率，为解决多目标安全控制中的约束冲突问题提供了新思路。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 请帮我查找动力系统的李雅普诺夫函数发现的相关论文，采用传统方法和transformer等ai算法都可以, especially work that connects or combines: discovering Lyapunov functions for dynamical systems; neural network based Lyapunov function; transformer model for Lyapunov function discovery; stability analysis of dynamical systems using Lyapunov functions; Lyapunov neural network methods; data-driven discovery of Lyapunov functions; recent advances in Lyapunov function discovery using deep learning; traditional methods for Lyapunov function construction; comparison of classical and AI methods for Lyapunov functions.

quick_skim.title: ExTra: Exploratory Trajectory Optimization for Language Model Reinforcement Learning
quick_skim.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) for language-model reasoning can fail at both extremes of task difficulty: easy prompts often produce all-correct, low-diversity rollout groups with little gradient signal, while hard prompts can produce all-incorrect groups with no positive reward. We introduce ExTra (Exploratory Trajectory Optimization), a GRPO-compatible framework that extracts exploration signals from the model's own rollouts. ExTra combines two mechanisms: (i) a novelty reward that adds embedding-based diversity bonuses after GRPO normalization, rewarding diverse correct solutions; and (ii) entropy-guided prefix regeneration, which scores partial trajectories using entropy signals and continues exploration from promising intermediate steps. Across six mathematical reasoning benchmarks, ExTra improves Qwen3-1.7B over GRPO by about +5 points on pass@1 and +7 points on pass@16, showing that trajectory-level exploration signals can improve both single-sample accuracy and inference-time coverage.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: RL exploration method transferable to symbolic regression
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 可迁移至符号回归的强化学习探索方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 可迁移至符号回归的强化学习探索方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 可迁移至符号回归的强化学习探索方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: ExTra enhances RL for language models by adding novelty rewards and entropy-guided prefix regeneration to improve exploration, with potential transfer to symbolic regression.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对语言模型强化学习中的探索问题，提出ExTra框架，结合新颖性奖励和熵引导的前缀重生成机制，从模型自身轨迹中提取探索信号。该方法可推广到符号回归等需探索的任务，有效解决了简单和困难提示下的梯度信号不足问题。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对语言模型强化学习中的探索问题，提出ExTra框架，结合新颖性奖励和熵引导的前缀重生成机制，从模型自身轨迹中提取探索信号。该方法可推广到符号回归等需探索的任务，有效解决了简单和困难提示下的梯度信号不足问题。
